name: Quarterly Executive Rollup
description: Last business day of each quarter. Nemotron assembles board-ready report from Airtable data covering all KPIs, revenue by segment, CPA trend, top/bottom zones, and conversion funnel.

config.condition: Run on last business day of March, June, September, December

config.description: Check if today is last business day of quarter
config.code: const today = new Date(); const month = today.getMonth() + 1; const quarterEnds = [3, 6, 9, 12]; if (!quarterEnds.includes(month)) { output = { is_quarter_end: false }; } else { const lastDay = new Date(today.getFullYear(), month, 0).getDate(); const lastDate = new Date(today.getFullYear(), month - 1, lastDay); while (lastDate.getDay() === 0 || lastDate.getDay() === 6) { lastDate.setDate(lastDate.getDate() - 1); } const isLastBizDay = today.getDate() === lastDate.getDate(); const quarter = 'Q' + Math.ceil(month / 3); output = { is_quarter_end: isLastBizDay, quarter, year: today.getFullYear() }; }

config.description: Pull all KPI events for current quarter

config.code: const events = inputData.kpi_events || []; const costs = inputData.cost_records || []; const stats = { total_dials: 0, connections: 0, bookings: 0, closes: 0, investor_flags: 0, content_published: 0, total_inference_cost: 0 }; events.forEach(e => { if (e.metric === 'call_disposition') { stats.total_dials++; if (e.connected) stats.connections++; if (e.booked) stats.bookings++; } if (e.metric === 'content_published') stats.content_published++; }); costs.forEach(c => { stats.total_inference_cost += parseFloat(c.est_cost_usd || 0); }); stats.connect_rate = stats.total_dials > 0 ? ((stats.connections / stats.total_dials) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0'; stats.book_rate = stats.connections > 0 ? ((stats.bookings / stats.connections) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0'; output = stats;

payload.prompt: Generate a board-ready quarterly executive report for Coastal Key Treasure Coast Asset Management. Quarter: {{step1.quarter}} {{step1.year}}. Data: Total dials: {{step5.total_dials}}. Connect rate: {{step5.connect_rate}}%. Book rate: {{step5.book_rate}}%. Content pieces published: {{step5.content_published}}. AI inference cost: ${{step5.total_inference_cost}}. Format as: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY, KEY METRICS TABLE, SEGMENT PERFORMANCE, ZONE ANALYSIS, CONTENT OPERATIONS, AI COST EFFICIENCY, RECOMMENDATIONS. Keep under 1500 words. Close with forward-looking risk assessment.

config.message: {{step1.quarter}} {{step1.year}} QUARTERLY REPORT DELIVERED | Dials: {{step5.total_dials}} | Connect: {{step5.connect_rate}}% | Content: {{step5.content_published}} | AI Cost: ${{step5.total_inference_cost}} | Full report emailed to CEO
